sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8475" key="a)nerga/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνεργ-άζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n8475.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">knead, work up,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:9:39:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.39.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
